news.summary: In London on April 10, 2025, a new online platform called re-centre has introduced a cutting-edge Hypopressives app catered towards aiding women in postnatal pelvic floor recovery. This innovative app, which is now accessible on both the App Store and Google Play, aims to assist women in enhancing their pelvic health.
news.headline: re-centre launched Hypopressives app for postnatal pelvic recovery on App Store & Google Play.

news.summary: A highly experienced industry leader with decades of entrepreneurial and technology expertise is joining forces with independent hospitality providers to enhance their revenue solutions using AI technology. On April 10, 2025, in San Francisco, TakeUp launched as the top AI-driven revenue optimization platform catering to independent hospitality businesses. This move aims to revolutionize how these providers manage and boost their revenues by incorporating cutting-edge technology and industry know-how.
news.headline: Bobby Marhamat appointed as TakeUp CEO to drive growth and innovation in AI-driven hospitality tech.

news.summary: In Cerritos, California on April 10, 2025, Cerritos Auto Square, recognized as America's biggest auto mall, introduced their newest innovation, the complimentary Concierge Department. This pioneering service offers car buyers in Southern California the opportunity to utilize the assistance of concierge representatives at no cost. These dedicated representatives will guide customers in selecting their ideal car model, providing a convenient and personalized shopping experience.
news.headline: Cerritos Auto Square in Calif launches free Concierge Dept. for car shoppers, offering personalized assistance.

news.summary: Expedera Inc. has recently obtained the ISO 9001:2015 certification in addition to its previous ISO 26262 ASIL-B readiness certification. This achievement further solidifies Expedera's position as a top provider of scalable Neural Processing Unit (NPU) semiconductor technology. The company, based in SANTA CLARA, Calif., announced this milestone on April 10, 2025.
news.headline: Expedera Inc. attains ISO 9001:2015 certification in Santa Clara. 26262 ASIL-B ready. Leader in NPU semiconductor.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, in New Orleans, Louisiana, 365 Connect revealed that Kerry W. Kirby, the Founder and CEO, will be leading the company. 365 Connect specializes in providing cutting-edge automated marketing, leasing, and resident engagement services for multifamily communities globally. Kerry W. Kirby will continue to steer the company towards success with their innovative platform.
news.headline: 365 Connect's CEO, Kerry W. Kirby, receives Noble Award for Outstanding Tech Entrepreneur in New Orleans on April 10, 2025.

news.summary: Delray Beach, Florida - On April 10, 2025, Cyrano Therapeutics, Inc., a company focused on developing treatments for smell loss, announced that data from a study evaluating the first potential therapy for post-viral hyposmia is anticipated to be released in the fourth quarter of 2025. This clinical-stage regenerative medicine company is eagerly awaiting the results which could signify a significant advancement in addressing smell-related issues. Stay tuned for updates on this promising development.
news.headline: Cyrano Therapeutics finishes Phase 2 trial enrollment for CYR-064 to treat post-viral smell loss with data anticipated in Q4 2025.
US Supercore CPI MoM -0.240%, Previous 0.220%
US Supercore CPI YoY 2.860%, Previous 3.780%

news.summary: Peak Mobile Holdings, a prominent mobile healthcare services provider, based in Austin, Texas, has recently acquired New England Vascular Access, a leading mobile vascular access services company operating in New Hampshire, Vermont, and Maine. This acquisition is part of Peak's strategy to expand its presence in the Northeast region and enhance its offerings in preventing hospital admissions and readmissions. With this acquisition, Peak aims to strengthen its on-demand vascular access services, catering to a wider audience in the region.
news.headline: Peak Mobile Holdings acquires New England Vascular Access, expanding mobile vascular services in N. New England.

news.summary: The report "Automotive Robotics Market by Components, Robot Types, Application, Region, and Company Analysis 2025-2033" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. It forecasts substantial growth in the Automotive Robotics market, projected to reach US$22.49 billion by 2033, up from US$8.88 billion in 2024. This represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 10.87% from 2025 to 2033. The implementation of automotive robotics has revolutionized manufacturing processes, leading to enhanced quality control, heightened productivity, and reduced human error.
news.headline: Automotive Robotics Market to reach $22.49 billion by 2033 from $8.88 billion in 2024, with a CAGR of 10.87%.

news.summary: In Arlington, Virginia, Graham Holdings Company (NYSE: GHC) has announced that its 2025 Annual Meeting of Shareholders is scheduled for May 6, 2025 at 8:30 am (ET) in person. The meeting will be available via webcast as well. Shareholders interested in attending can find more details and presentation materials on the Company’s website, www.ghco.com. Those planning to participate either in person or through webcast must register in advance. For inquiries or to submit questions, please visit the provided registration link.
news.headline: Graham Holdings Company Annual Meeting on May 6, 2025, at 8:30 am (ET), accessible in-person and via webcast. Register online.

news.summary: Capri Holdings Limited, a global fashion luxury group, has signed a definitive agreement to sell Versace to Prada S.p.A. for $1.375 billion in cash with potential adjustments. The transaction is set to finalize in the second half of 2025, pending regulatory approvals. John D. Idol, Capri Holdings' Chairman and CEO, emphasized Versace's iconic status in the announcement.
news.headline: Capri Holdings sells Versace to Prada for $1.375 billion in cash. Expected to close in second half of 2025.

news.summary: In Santa Barbara, California, Sonos, Inc. (Nasdaq: SONO) has named Hugo Barra to its Board of Directors as of April 7, 2025. Barra, co-founder and head of product at /dev/agents, a software firm focusing on an innovative operating system for AI agents, brings valuable experience to the role. Known for his background in reputable consumer tech companies, Barra’s appointment was welcomed by Sonos Chair Julius Genachowski.
news.headline: Sonos adds Hugo Barra to Board of Directors on April 7, 2025. Mike Volpi steps down. Nasdaq: SONO.

news.summary: Perfect Moment Ltd., a high-performance luxury skiwear and lifestyle brand listed on NYSE American under PMNT, disclosed achieving an all-time high in brand coverage for the 2025 fiscal year concluding on March 31, 2025. The President and Chief Creative Officer, Jane Gottschalk, emphasized that the unprecedented numbers mirror the brand's increasing cultural significance, expanding consumer interest, and robust growth trajectory heading into the upcoming phase of development. The company expressed enthusiasm regarding this advancement.
news.headline: Perfect Moment (NYSE American: PMNT) achieves record global brand reach in Fiscal 2025, with highest-ever numbers showcasing rising cultural relevance and deepening consumer appeal. President Jane Gottschalk expresses excitement for next growth phase.

news.summary: In Centennial, Colo., NUBURU, Inc. (NYSE American: BURU), a prominent player in high-power blue laser technology, revealed the termination of its $2 million Share Exchange Agreement and collaboration with HUMBL, Inc. (OTC: HMBL) as of now. Following a comprehensive strategic assessment, NUBURU's management decided that upholding the partnership no longer fits its primary business goals. The partnership, first disclosed on February 28, 2025, was aimed at enhancing their technologies.
news.headline: NUBURU, Inc. ends $2 million partnership with HUMBL, Inc. due to strategic misalignment.

news.summary: Alorica Inc., a company based in Irvine, California, has unveiled evoAI, a new conversational AI platform. This platform is intended to enhance customer experiences across digital and voice channels. evoAI utilizes a hybrid architecture, combining rule-based systems for managing structured interactions and advanced neural networks for providing more human-like responses to intricate scenarios. This technology aims to improve interactions through its ability to handle various types of conversations effectively.
news.headline: Alorica launches evoAI, advanced conversational AI platform for customer experiences. Hybrid architecture combines rule-based systems and neural networks for natural interactions.

news.summary: Claritev Corporation, headquartered in McLean, Virginia, has disclosed the schedule for its First Quarter 2025 Earnings Conference Call. The company is set to discuss its financial performance and results for the mentioned quarter during this call. Investors and stakeholders can participate in this conference call to gain insights into how the company fared in the initial months of 2025. This event serves as an opportunity for individuals to understand Claritev Corporation's earnings, growth, and overall financial health in the current year so far.
news.headline: Claritev Corp. to hold Q1 2025 earnings call in McLean, VA.

news.summary: In San Diego and San Francisco, Sharp HealthCare, the leading integrated health system in San Diego, will now utilize the Abridge generative AI platform system-wide. This implementation aims to produce thorough, compliant, and billable documentation, allowing clinicians to prioritize patient care. Abridge will be rolled out across all Sharp HealthCare facilities, which collectively cater to over one million patients each year. Medical records play a crucial role for various purposes and stakeholders in the healthcare industry.
news.headline: Sharp HealthCare selects Abridge AI platform for clinical documentation to assist 1M+ patients, allowing clinicians to prioritize care over coding.

news.summary: A recent report has revealed that Fastly's Application Security Solutions have provided an impressive return on investment (ROI) of 235% over a span of three years. This signifies substantial growth and effectiveness in their CDN services.
news.headline: Fastly's application security solutions provided a 235% ROI over three years in San Francisco. #FSLY #CDN

news.summary: In Burlington, Massachusetts, Myomo, Inc. (NYSE American: MYO), a company specializing in wearable medical robotics for individuals with neurological disorders and upper-limb paralysis, revealed that two of its directors, Amy Knapp and Yitzchak Jacobovitz, will not seek re-election as Class II directors. Ms. Knapp has served on the board since July 2016, while Mr. Jacobovitz joined on January 2.
news.headline: Myomo, Inc. announces upcoming changes to its board of directors with directors Amy Knapp and Yitzchak Jacobovitz not standing for re-election.

news.summary: In Denver, Spruce Power Holding Corporation (NYSE: SPRU) revealed a significant move by signing a new servicing partnership with Hot Purple Energy, a solar installer, focusing on commercial & residential projects. The collaboration aims to capitalize on Solar Renewable Energy Credits (SREC) in California. This strategic partnership aligns with Spruce's goal to maximize the potential of SREC credits through their platform and expertise. This initiative signifies a broader strategy by Spruce to unlock the value of SREC credits in the market.
news.headline: Spruce Power partners with Hot Purple Energy to monetize Solar Renewable Energy Credits in California. ($NY.A: SPRU)

news.summary: Cheniere, a company headquartered in Houston, has announced the schedule for the release of its first-quarter 2025 earnings report. The report will be made public via a conference call. This quarterly financial update will provide stakeholders and investors insights into the company's performance and results for the mentioned period. The specific dates and times for the earnings release and conference call are crucial for those interested in Cheniere's financial standing and future prospects.
news.headline: Cheniere in Houston schedules Q1 2025 earnings release and call.

news.summary: In Baltimore on April 10, 2025, T. Rowe Price Group, Inc. (NASDAQ-GS: TROW) disclosed that their assets under management as of March 31, 2025, amounted to an estimated $1.57 trillion. The firm experienced net outflows of approximately $1.8 billion in March 2025 and $8.6 billion for the quarter concluding in March.
news.headline: T. Rowe Price Group reports $1.57 trillion assets under management as of March 31, 2025 with net outflows of $1.8 billion for March and $8.6 billion for the quarter.

news.summary: In response to persistent labor shortages and increasing consumer demands, the hospitality and food service industries are notably shifting towards leveraging service robots powered by artificial intelligence (AI). This transition comes as a proactive response to the challenges faced by these sectors. Industry reports indicate a significant uptick in the adoption of AI-driven service robots, with the numbers steadily increasing. The implementation of these advanced technologies has proven to be instrumental in streamlining operations and enhancing customer satisfaction.
news.headline: AI-driven service robots revolutionize hospitality due to labor shortages, rising demands. Industr leaders adopt AI solutions.

news.summary: Legacy Risk Solutions of Gainesville, Georgia has been honored as the 2024 Agency of the Year by Frankenmuth Insurance, a renowned super-regional carrier headquartered in Frankenmuth, Michigan. The prestigious award was presented on April 10, 2025.
news.headline: Frankenmuth Insurance names Legacy Risk Solutions 2024 Agency of the Year, based in Gainesville, Georgia.

news.summary: A partnership has been formed with PJM, Google, and Tapestry in an effort to decrease wait times for the introduction of new generation technologies. The collaboration, announced on April 10, 2025, aims to use AI-enhanced tools to enhance PJM’s planning process. This multiyear initiative seeks to streamline the process of connecting new generation facilities to the grid. This collaboration is anticipated to significantly reduce the current wait times for integrating new technologies into the system.
news.headline: PJM, Google & Tapestry partner to use AI for regional planning, generation interconnection, aiming to reduce wait times.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, in Miami, Innovative Eyewear, Inc. (NASDAQ: LUCY | LUCYW) revealed that their smart eyewear line under Lucyd®, Nautica®, Eddie Bauer® and Reebok® brands has a new addition. Lucyd Armor™ smart safety glasses have received European Union EN certification, ensuring they meet required safety standards. This development showcases the company's commitment to providing high-quality, innovative products. With this certification, Lucyd Armor™ can now be marketed throughout the EU, potentially expanding their market reach and boosting revenue for the company.
news.headline: Innovative Eyewear (NASDAQ: LUCY | LUCYW) gets EU Certification for Lucyd Armor™ Safety Glasses, enters EU market.

news.summary: Planet Fitness is offering a complimentary HydroMassage to both members and non-members across the country from April 12 to April 19. This initiative is part of the Black Card Spa® services. Planet Fitness is a leading franchisor and operator of fitness centers, known for its rapid growth. The promotion is set to take place nationwide and aims to provide relaxation and wellness benefits to a wide audience.
news.headline: Free Hydromassage at Planet Fitness from April 12-19 to relax during tax season, open to all, across all locations.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, ePlus Inc., a company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol NGS: PLUS, declared that it has become a NVIDIA DGX SuperPOD Specialization Partner, consolidating its standing as a key player in AI infrastructure solutions. This move showcases ePlus' commitment to advancing in the field of AI, highlighting its capabilities to provide advanced solutions.
news.headline: ePlus becomes NVIDIA DGX SuperPOD Specialization Partner, solidifying its AI infrastructure leadership.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, in Parsippany, New Jersey, PNY® launched the PRO Elite™ High Endurance microSD Flash Memory Cards designed for rigorous recording in surveillance systems, dash cams, body cams, and other video monitoring gadgets. The cards are tailored to facilitate uninterrupted recording and ensure durability in demanding environments.
news.headline: PNY introduces PRO Elite High Endurance microSD cards for surveillance, dash cams, body cams, with focus on continuous recording.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, in Pittsburgh, Magna5, a prominent national company offering managed IT, cybersecurity, and cloud-based services and a NewSpring Holdings platform entity, revealed the successful acquisition of Shock I.T. Support (Shock IT), a regional frontrunner in managed IT and cybersecurity. This acquisition strengthens Magna5's position in the industry and enhances its capabilities to serve clients. The deal signifies a significant advancement for Magna5 as it continues to expand its market presence.
news.headline: Magna5 buys Shock IT to boost IT and cybersecurity in Mid-Atlantic, expands services.

news.summary: In Salt Lake City on April 10, 2025, Health Catalyst, Inc. unveiled its latest product, Health Catalyst Ignite Spark™. As a prominent provider of data and analytics solutions for healthcare organizations, Health Catalyst operates under the Nasdaq symbol HCAT. The launch of Health Catalyst Ignite Spark™ marks a significant advancement in tailored data and analytics services.
news.headline: Health Catalyst releases Health Catalyst Ignite Spark™ for healthcare organizations, Nasdaq: HCAT, on April 10, 2025.
Conduit Pharmaceuticals to Repurchase Shares worth $1M.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on April 10, 2025, Atico Mining Corporation (TSX.V: ATY | OTC: ATCMF) shared news that the National Mining Agency, along with the Governor of Choco and the Mayor of El Carmen de Atrato, have made a public announcement. They revealed that a new 30-year mining title will be given to Minera El Roble.
news.headline: Atico Mining secures new 30-year mining title with Minera El Roble, supported by NMA, Governor, and Mayor.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, in Haifa, Israel, Pluri Inc. disclosed that it had secured a patent from the U.S. Patent and Trademark Office (USPTO) safeguarding their immune cell expansion technologies, with a focus on MAIT cells, a vital T cell subset aiding the body in combatting infections and tissue repair. This patent aligns with the one obtained in Israel, paralleling the US version. The company, traded as PLUR on Nasdaq and TASE, now possesses an extensive intellectual property portfolio comprising more than 250 patents in various stages of approval.
news.headline: Pluri Inc. has gained two patents for 3D expansion of immune cells in the US and Israel, adding to their 250 total IP assets.

news.summary: UMeWorld has introduced an innovation hub and appointed a Chief Scientist as part of its strategy to propel the global expansion of DAGola oil, a heart-healthy product boasting 80% fewer triglycerides.
news.headline: UMeWorld opens innovation center, appoints Chief Scientist, and expands DAGola oil worldwide with 80% less triglycerides.

news.summary: Singapore, 10th April 2025 - Technology provider SIMPPLE Ltd. (NASDAQ: SPPL) has unveiled its latest innovation in robotics, the Orion robot, offering real-time security surveillance, on-demand digital concierge support, and intelligent spot cleaning and sweeping features. The debut occurred at Kings Club, Melbourne in a private event organized by Melbourne property management firm Above OCM and technology integrator Australian Robot Technology. The launch showcased SIMPPLE’s multi-functional robots, Gemini and Orion, to clients and partners of Above OCM and Australian Robot Technology, highlighting the capabilities of the robots.
news.headline: SIMPPLE Ltd. debuts multi-functional robot Orion with security surveillance, concierge support, cleaning capabilities at Kings Club, Melbourne.

news.summary: Developing a comprehensive plan for the future of waste-to-energy infrastructure. This initiative aims to revolutionize the management of waste by converting it into energy. The blueprint will outline strategies for optimizing the process and maximizing efficiency. With an estimated investment of $50 million, the project seeks to enhance sustainability efforts and reduce reliance on traditional energy sources. The goal is to establish a state-of-the-art facility that can process 500 tons of waste daily, generating enough energy to power 10,000 homes. This innovative approach is seen as a crucial step towards a more sustainable and eco-friendly future.
news.headline: Sky Quarry and Southwind RAS, LLC to collaborate on waste-to-energy infrastructure, aiming to set a blueprint for the future.

news.summary: Bakersfield, California,  April 10, 2025 - Trio Petroleum Corp (NYSE American: TPET), a California-based oil and gas firm, recently completed the acquisition of petroleum and natural gas assets from Novacor Exploration Ltd. The purchase specifically includes Novacor's TWP48 Assets, with the closing on TWP47 assets expected soon. These assets are situated in the Lloydminster, Saskatchewan heavy oil region, positioning Trio to potentially expand into one of North America's prominent heavy oil basins. The acquisition offers opportunities for long-term production and reserve growth due to the economic development and low operational costs associated with heavy oil in the area. The market accessibility and favorable regulatory environment further enhance the attractiveness of these assets for continued and future development within the region.
news.headline: Trio Petroleum Corp acquires cash flow positive oil assets in Saskatchewan, Canada from Novacor Exploration Ltd, in promising Lloydminster region.

news.summary: Batavia, Illinois - On April 10, 2025, High Wire Networks, Inc. disclosed that its Overwatch cybersecurity division, part of OTCQB-listed HWNI, is expected to experience a significant surge in cyberwarfare operations amid escalating global tariff conflicts. The corporation forecasts heightened activity due to geopolitical strains, especially concerning the United States and China, which is projected to fuel a greater need for resilient and adaptable cybersecurity measures.
news.headline: High Wire Networks predicts an increase in cyberwarfare due to tariff war escalation; expansion expected for cybersecurity solutions. OTVQB: HWNI.

news.summary: Michael Mo, the CEO and Co-Founder of KULR Technology Group, is scheduled to deliver a speech at Strategy World 2025. This event is a prestigious global conference centering on advancements in artificial intelligence (AI) and business intelligence (BI). Mo's presence highlights the significance of his insights in this field. The event is expected to draw a large audience, including prominent figures and experts in the industry. This opportunity serves as a platform for Mo to share KULR's contributions to the sector. Stay tuned for updates on this significant event featuring key players shaping the future of AI and BI.
news.headline: NYSE: KULR CEO Michael Mo to speak at Strategy World 2025, focusing on AI and BI innovation.
Inozyme Pharma shows real-world impact of ENPP1 Deficiency in JBMR Plus publication, highlighting essential findings.
US short-term interest-rate futures rise after data as traders add to bets on Fed rate cuts.

news.summary: In Tel Aviv, Israel, on April 10, 2025, PainReform Ltd. (Nasdaq: PRFX), a clinical-stage specialty pharmaceutical company utilizing AI-powered energy optimization technologies, revealed its entry into the fast-growing Smart Energy Management (SEM) industry. The expansion came after acquiring DeepSolar, a leading AI software provider focusing on enhancing solar energy utilization in residential and utility-scale solar power facilities. This strategic move positions PainReform as a key player in SEM, tapping into a sector with significant growth potential.
news.headline: PainReform acquires DeepSolar to enter Smart Energy Management sector, focusing on solar optimization market. #AI #SEM #PRFX

news.summary: A prominent cybersecurity company has been enlisted to enhance field communications for military personnel. This partnership aims to bolster the security measures in place for the warfighters by leveraging the expertise and technology of the cybersecurity leader. This collaboration comes at a crucial time when ensuring secure communication channels for soldiers is of utmost importance. The cybersecurity firm's role will involve implementing advanced protective measures and protocols to safeguard sensitive military data and information exchanged during field operations. This endeavor underscores the commitment to fortifying the cybersecurity infrastructure for the defense sector and underscores the significance of reliable and secure communication systems in modern warfare.
news.headline: Telos Corporation gets $5.8M contract to aid DoD's Microwave Line of Sight Program, enhancing warfighter field communications.

news.summary: In Boston, MA on April 10, 2025, Netcapital Inc. (Nasdaq: NCPL, NCPLW) disclosed that Avadain, a graphene-licensing technology firm, garnered over $1.275 million in the initial 24 hours of unveiling its third funding round on the Netcapital platform.
news.headline: Avadain raises $1.275+ million in 24 hours on Netcapital.

news.summary: UAV Corp is making significant progress as its technologically advanced T-Wing UAV project approaches completion. The company is experiencing a surge in global momentum, with a particular focus on expanding operations in Saudi Arabia. This strategic move aims to tap into the lucrative market in the region. The T-Wing UAV, with cutting-edge features and capabilities, showcases UAV Corp's commitment to innovation. This development signals the company's growing presence in the industry.
news.headline: UAV Corp nearing completion of T-Wing, expanding globally with focus on Saudi Arabia.
Rapala VMC Corp released its 2024 Annual Report, showcasing financial data and performance.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, SecureTech Innovations, Inc. (OTC: SCTH), a prominent cybersecurity and technology company based in Roseville, Minnesota, revealed a significant development. The company has joined forces with RockerFunder LLC, a renowned financial and marketing consultancy from New York. This strategic partnership is set to cover a wide range of areas including investor relations, public relations, strategic guidance, and initiatives focusing on blockchain technology. The main objectives of this collaboration are to boost SecureTech's presence in the market, actively engage with investors, and facilitate the long-term growth and expansion of the business.
news.headline: SecureTech Innovations, Inc. partners with RockerFunder LLC for investor relations and blockchain initiatives.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, KANZHUN LIMITED, operating under "BOSS Zhipin," shared its 2024 Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) report, showcasing dedication to sustainability. The report emphasizes creating a responsible online recruitment platform that benefits job seekers, enhances business growth, and contributes to lasting societal impact. KANZHUN LIMITED is a prominent player in online recruitment in China, listed on Nasdaq as BZ and HKEX as 2076.
news.headline: KANZHUN LIMITED releases 2024 ESG report; reaffirms commitment to sustainability.
